S.FORM: Ernie Beck Ernie Beck sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, wal malaxmisuq qaniy la. kawas tay 1931, ryax sa tay 11 nqu tay 12, Ernie Beck, squliq na p'unro. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
